'''pazhoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yobbishness|yobbishness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yobbishness|yobbishness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pazhoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzheheth|pæzheheth]] || [[word:pæzhehej|pæzhehej]] || [[word:pæzhehesh|pæzhehesh]] || [[word:pæzhehe|pæzhehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhozhohoth|pazhozhohoth]] || [[word:pazhozhohoj|pazhozhohoj]] || [[word:pazhozhohosh|pazhozhohosh]] || [[word:pazhozhoho|pazhozhoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhohoth|pazhohoth]] || [[word:pazhohoj|pazhohoj]] || [[word:pazhohosh|pazhohosh]] || [[word:pazhoho|pazhoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhofhoth|pazhofhoth]] || [[word:pazhofhoj|pazhofhoj]] || [[word:pazhofhosh|pazhofhosh]] || [[word:pazhofhof|pazhofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazhohotho|pazhohotho]] || [[word:pazhohojo|pazhohojo]] || [[word:pazhohosho|pazhohosho]] || [[word:pazhohoko|pazhohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazhohoth|pazhohoth]] || [[word:pazhohoj|pazhohoj]] || [[word:pazhohosh|pazhohosh]] || [[word:pazhoho|pazhoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazhohothol|pazhohothol]] || [[word:pazhohojol|pazhohojol]] || [[word:pazhohoshol|pazhohoshol]] || [[word:pazhohokol|pazhohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazhohothotho|pazhohothotho]] || [[word:pazhohojojo|pazhohojojo]] || [[word:pazhohoshosho|pazhohoshosho]] || [[word:pazhohoko|pazhohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazhohothon|pazhohothon]] || [[word:pazhohojon|pazhohojon]] || [[word:pazhohoshon|pazhohoshon]] || [[word:pazhohokon|pazhohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazhohothoro|pazhohothoro]] || [[word:pazhohojoro|pazhohojoro]] || [[word:pazhohoshoro|pazhohoshoro]] || [[word:pazhohokoro|pazhohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
